auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
Sign in once – the offline token does not expire.

1) Press F12 → open the Network tab.

2) Open the following login link:
{auth_url}

3) Sign in. The browser will redirect to the dashboard.

4) In the Network tab, filter for "token" and click the POST request to the Keycloak token endpoint.

5) Open the Response tab → copy the value of "refresh_token" (starts with "eyJ").

6) Paste the copied value here.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
Your DKV session has expired or is no longer valid.

1) Press F12 → open the Network tab.

2) Open the following login link:
{auth_url}

3) Sign in. The browser will redirect to the dashboard.

4) In the Network tab, filter for "token" and click the POST request to the Keycloak token endpoint.

5) Open the Response tab → copy the value of "refresh_token" (starts with "eyJ").

6) Paste the copied value here.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please copy the refresh token again from the Network tab and paste it here.
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please paste the refresh token from the Network tab (starts with 'eyJ').
error.invalid_redirect_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Please paste the refresh token from the Network tab.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
